name: stackra/mfa
purpose: MFA module — TOTP two-round enrolment, WebAuthn credential registry, recovery-code download, and MFA challenge orchestration.
capabilities: WebauthnCredential FIDO2 registry with relying-party binding
MfaChallenge lifecycle over the shared auth ledger
Publishes MFA verification result to the auth challenge
when_to_use: Enrolling users in a second factor and orchestrating the challenge-verify handshake at login.
when_not_to_use: For JWT signing keys, refresh rotation, and password resets, reach for the sibling stackra/auth package.
